title: Senior Doctor - Medanta - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Medanta - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
